task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Approval Queue** (Level 7)

Build an approval queue. Employees submit requests (title, description, amount). The request starts as 'pending'. A logged-in approver can update the status to 'approved' or 'rejected' (this requires auth). Need: POST /api/requests (public submit), GET /api/requests (list all), GET /api/requests/pending (filtered list), PUT /api/requests/:id (update, auth required).

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a
final_source:
/*
DATAFLOW:
┌──────────┐    POST /api/requests    ┌──────────┐    save    ┌────────┐
│ Frontend │ ──────────────────────> │ Backend  │ ────────> │   DB   │
│  (form)  │ <────────────────────── │ (server) │ <──────── │(memory)│
└──────────┘    GET /api/requests    └──────────┘   query   └────────┘
      │                                     │
      │  page load --> GET /api/requests    │
      │  form submit --> POST               │  PUT /api/requests/:id (requires auth)
      │  pending view --> GET /pending      │  --> update status
*/

build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory
log every request
database is local memory

create a Requests table:
  title, required
  description
  amount (number), default 0
  status, default 'pending'

owner is 'approver@example.com'
allow signup and login

# Public endpoint to submit a request
when user sends data to /api/requests:
  validate data:
    title is text, required
  saved = save data to Requests
  send back saved with status 201

# Get all requests
when user requests data from /api/requests:
  send back all Requests

# Get pending requests only
when user requests data from /api/requests/pending:
  send back all Requests where status is 'pending'

# Update request status (requires auth)
when user updates update_data at /api/requests/:id:
  requires login
  save update_data to Requests
  send back 'updated' with status 200

# Frontend pages
page 'Approval Queue' at '/':
  section 'Submit a Request':
    title = ''
    description = ''
    amount = 0
    'Title' is a text input saved as title
    'Description' is a text area saved as description
    'Amount' is a number input saved as amount
    button 'Submit Request':
      send { title: title, description: description, amount: amount } as a new record to '/api/requests'
      set title to ''
      set description to ''
      set amount to 0
      show alert 'Request submitted successfully'

  on page load get all_requests from '/api/requests'
  section 'All Requests':
    display all_requests as table

  on page load get pending_requests from '/api/requests/pending'
  section 'Pending Requests':
    display pending_requests as table
